idle resources

Role Permissions

3 roles
Admin 👑
Full access to all features. Can manage users, configure VPS settings, and view all data.
📊 View Dashboard
🐳 View Containers
⚙️ Configure Settings
👥 Manage Users
🔒 Manage Permissions
🔄 Generate Reports
Engineer 🔧
Can view dashboard, container details, and generate cost reports. Cannot manage users or settings.
📊 View Dashboard
🐳 View Containers
⚙️ Configure Settings
👥 Manage Users
🔒 Manage Permissions
🔄 Generate Reports
Management 📋
Can view dashboard with cost summaries, per-container costs, and high-level reports. Cannot configure settings or manage users.
📊 View Dashboard
🐳 View Container Costs
⚙️ Configure Settings
👥 Manage Users
🔒 Manage Permissions
🔄 Generate Reports
